title: No Scary Cave Sounds
description: Removes scary cave noises. While keeping default cave ambience untouched in Minecraft. Works with most Ambient mods.
body:
# **About**
Never be jumpscared by cave audio again. This resource pack mutes the scary cave audio files while keeping the rest of the ambience untouched. Files like cave1.ogg, cave2.ogg and related cave ambience are replaced with just silence.
1. Removes creepy cave found files 2. Keeps all other Minecraft sounds unchanged 3. No mods needed

![a screenshot of a video editing timeline showing a 15 minute long recorded clip with two red circles marking the two large audio waves that stand out from the rest of the audio. Two white arrows are pointing to the two red circles.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04d500ccdd81f0b9009907dc615222001f987396.png)

## **Uses**
Perfect for builders, explorers, streamers, and average players who want calm gameplay. No more listening to your chill music and then 5 minutes later get an unnecessarily loud horror sound effect just for being down in the caves.

## **Compatibility**
- Works with Vanilla Minecraft - Works with most resource and modpacks - Safe to use on servers as client-side.
